atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports anxiety.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports breast changes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports anxiety was significant in November and December of last year.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes buspar.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient notes anxiety often spiked around her menstrual periods.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports anxiety episodes beginning during the day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes anxiety to the stress of delivering COVID-19 test results.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling selfish because she wasn't on the front lines.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing increased hunger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a sense of being 'off'.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the appearance of small, persistent lumps in her breasts.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is concerned about the lumps given her family history of breast cancer.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's mother has a diagnosis of breast cancer.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports palpable, smaller lumps in the left breast.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reveals palpable, smaller lumps in the left breast, which are tender to palpation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's face appears somewhat thinner.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports weight loss over the past six months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's vital signs are within normal limits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The pap smear from 2019 was negative.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suspects the patient presents with anxiety, likely exacerbated by pandemic-related stress and recent hormonal changes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports the patient has palpable breast changes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A referral to a breast specialist will be arranged.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes buspar as medication.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a camila birth control refill.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow-up will be scheduled in four weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient on the importance of self-examination and reporting any new or concerning changes.
